name: DW · Mkt Email Event
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS email_event_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EMCMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100)      AS campaign_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EMCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)    AS customer_id,
    (ARRAY['Sent','Delivered','Opened','Clicked','Bounced','Unsubscribed'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EMTYPE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS event_type,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('EMDATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 180)::int) AS event_date,
    'subject_' || (('x'||substr(md5('EMSUBJ'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 25 + 1) AS subject_line_variant,
    (ARRAY['Newsletter','Promo','Transactional','Drip','Winback'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('EMETYPE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)] AS email_type
FROM generate_series(1, 8000) AS gs
